name: Gdi Property Group
analysis: GDI has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 11% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.6200, stop A$0.5940, target A$0.6980 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
